name: Deep-South Resources Inc.
description: Deep-South Resources Inc. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of major mineral properties. The company's primary asset is the Haib Copper Project in Namibia, one of the largest undeveloped copper deposits in Africa. Deep-South Resources is committed to growth through the expansion of its mineral resources and the application of modern exploration and development technologies to create value for its shareholders.
